paper_title: Ecotoxicological Investigation in Three Model Species Exposed to Elutriates of Marine Sediments Inoculated With Bioplastics

methods.description: This method involves testing the effects of elutriates from marine sediments inoculated with bioplastics on three model species to assess potential ecotoxicological impacts.

steps.description: Collect marine sediment samples from designated locations.
Inoculate sediment samples with bioplastics and prepare elutriates.
steps.searchable_summary: inoculate sediments with bioplastics and prepare elutriates

steps.description: Expose three model species to the prepared elutriates and monitor for ecotoxicological effects.
steps.searchable_summary: expose species to elutriates and monitor effects
